PR surface: Source +109, Tests +359, Docs +2. Total +470 across 18 files.

target.title: feat(agents): auto-trim lean local model tools
target.body:
## Summary

- add `localModelLean: "auto"` so small resolved local-model context caps trim the browser, cron, and message tools without forcing the setting on larger models
- route the resolved/effective model context into agent tool construction and `tools.effective` inventory so advertised tools match runtime behavior
- document the local-model lean workflow for Ollama and local gateway troubleshooting

Related to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599, but does not close it. This PR only addresses the small/local model tool-surface pressure lane.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: local-model agents can opt into automatic lean tool trimming for resolved context caps at a binary 64K window or smaller, including agent-level `contextTokens` caps.

Real environment tested: local Codex worktree, real Ollama Cloud API, and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.hints.test.ts`
- real Ollama Cloud API smoke against `ministral-3:3b` and `gemma3:4b`, non-streaming chat, `num_predict: 16`, `temperature: 0`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
- autoreview branch pass against `origin/main`
- after final rebase: `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` and `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts`

Evidence after fix:
- local scoped Vitest: 8 files, 159 tests passed
- final rebase sanity Vitest: 4 files, 63 tests passed
- Ollama Cloud API: `ministral-3:3b` returned HTTP 200 in 689ms; `gemma3:4b` returned HTTP 200 in 826ms
- AWS Crabbox provider `aws`, run `run_d434ef3ff1ee`, lease `cbx_eb7939ee8126`, slug `golden-hermit`, `pnpm check:changed` exit 0
- autoreview: no accepted/actionable findings

Observed result after fix: `localModelLean: "auto"` trims heavyweight tools for small or capped context models and leaves larger-context models on the full default tool surface.

What was not tested: a full OpenClaw CLI `infer model run` against Ollama from this linked source worktree. The source wrapper needs built `dist/entry.js`; attempting the build in this Codex worktree triggered pnpm dependency reconciliation against the shared symlinked `node_modules`, so I used direct real Ollama API proof plus repository tests and Crabbox instead.
target.author: vincentkoc
